title: Add type hints to screen callbacks
description:
Add missing type hints to callback functions for improved IDE support and documentation.

Files to update:
- todo_list.py (lines 160, 236, 295): Add type hints to on_modal_result callbacks
- create_task.py (line 236): Add type hints to callbacks

Pattern to follow:
```python
def on_modal_result(result: dict[str, Any] | None) -> None:
    if result and result.get("success"):
        # ...
```
acceptance_criteria: All callbacks have proper type hints; code passes type checker; IDE shows correct types

title: Remove _initialized flag from reactive watch guards
description:
Remove the _initialized flag entirely and simplify watch methods. The flag is unnecessary because Textual watch methods don't fire before mount.

Files: task_list.py, create_task.py

Changes needed:
- Delete _initialized flag initialization
- Remove guards in watch methods (watch_filter_contexts, etc.)
- Simplifies code and removes ~10 lines of unnecessary state tracking
acceptance_criteria: All _initialized flags and guards removed; watch methods called directly without conditions; tests pass
close_reason: Completed: Removed all _initialized flags and guards from TaskList and CompletedTaskList. Watch methods now fire directly without conditions, simplifying code and removing unnecessary state tracking.

title: Upgrade ConfirmScreen and FilterScreen to use ModalScreen with typing
description:
Upgrade custom screen classes to use Textual's ModalScreen pattern with generic typing for better UX and to prevent subtle bugs.

Benefits:
1. Prevents background app bindings from firing
2. Automatically adds semi-transparent background
3. Prevents multiple instances stacking

Changes needed:
- Change ConfirmScreen from Screen to ModalScreen[bool]
- Change FilterScreen from Screen to ModalScreen[FilterResult]
- Create FilterResult NamedTuple with contexts and projects fields
- Update dismiss calls to use typed results
- Update callback type hints
acceptance_criteria: Both screens extend ModalScreen with proper typing; callbacks have type hints; screen modality works correctly; tests pass
close_reason: Completed - Both ConfirmScreen and FilterScreen already use ModalScreen with proper generic typing. Upgraded FilterResult from dataclass to NamedTuple and added comprehensive test coverage for ConfirmScreen.

title: Add check_action to control footer action visibility
description:
Implement check_action method to dynamically show/hide actions in the footer based on current state. Currently actions show even when unavailable (e.g., delete when no task selected).

Changes needed:
- Add check_action(self, action: str, _params: Sequence[str]) -> bool | None method
- Return False to hide action from footer when unavailable
- Hide delete/edit/complete actions when no task is selected
- Hide filter/sort actions only when lists are empty

This improves UX by only showing available actions in the footer.
acceptance_criteria: check_action implemented; unavailable actions hidden from footer; all relevant actions properly gated; tests verify behavior
